title: yaebal full llm guide
text:
# yaebal full llm guide

yaebal is a typescript telegram bot api framework. it is esm-only, fetch-first, and designed for node, bun, deno, and edge runtimes where possible.

title: site coverage
text:
## site coverage

- covered page routes: 605
- non-api pages: 65
- api method pages: 180
- api type pages: 359
- sitemap: https://yaebal.mom/sitemap.xml
- robots: https://yaebal.mom/robots.txt

the complete route index below is generated from every `+page.svelte` route in `apps/docs/src/routes`. use it when you need exhaustive coverage of the public site.

title: core idea
derive vs decorate
text:
## derive vs decorate

- `derive`: async, per-update, use for current user, permissions, request ids, tenant state.
- `decorate`: static, no per-update computation, use for db clients, config, services, constants.

title: filters
plugins
ai
media
formatting
webhooks
testing
important urls
text:
## important urls

- home: https://yaebal.mom/
- docs: https://yaebal.mom/docs/getting-started/
- api reference: https://yaebal.mom/docs/api/
- playground: https://yaebal.mom/playground/
- github: https://github.com/neverlane/yaebal
- packages: https://yaebal.mom/docs/packages/
- llms compact index: https://yaebal.mom/llms.txt
- complete sitemap: https://yaebal.mom/sitemap.xml

title: do not hallucinate
text:
## do not hallucinate

- do not use telegraf-style `ctx.telegram`.
- do not use raw `use(plugin())` for yaebal plugins; use `install`.
- do not add `declare module` for context fields; use `derive`, `decorate`, or a typed plugin.
- do not use real telegram in tests unless the user explicitly asks for live integration.
- do not assume every bot api method has a direct `bot.api.method` shortcut; use `bot.api.call` when needed.
